message:
feat(crew): per-worker agent selection via worker_agents config (GH#2175)

Adds WorkerAgents map to RigSettings for per-crew-member agent overrides.
Resolution: worker_agents[name] > role_agents[crew] > defaults.

Fix-merged from dannomayernotabot/feat/worker-agents-per-crew-config-v2
with conflict resolution in crew/manager.go (startup dialog handling).

Also includes bundled lint fixes (nolint:unparam, unused parameter removal).

Co-Authored-By: Danno <dannomayernotabot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
